creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Adding jkim@ who last merged openssl 1.1.1n into the tree.

Hi Kim,
From our limited knowledge we are unable to pinpoint the problem here with freetds. But from what it looks like:

1. freebsd-12.3-Stable (2022/04/07)
   with openssl 1.1.n
   works smoothly
2. freebsd-13.1-RC2
   with openssl 1.1.n
   failed!

is the current situation with freetds. Can you just shade some lights on what changes are there in between openssl itself in 12.3-STABLE and 13.1-RC2. I will upgrade freetds today although not sure if it's going to fix the problem.
